tr.td: Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma

Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Total protein and globulin are slightly low, and total CO₂ is mildly decreased, which may indicate mild metabolic acidosis or protein loss. Lipid profile reveals elevated triglycerides and LDL cholesterol, increasing cardiovascular risk. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and cardiovascular risk management.

display.value: Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
